name: maquette
description: Image-guided website directions, executable brand proofs, section-fidelity contracts, and implemented pages

interface.shortDescription: Generate directions, brand proofs, section-fidelity contracts, and pages with image-first QA
interface.longDescription: Create greenfield website directions, executable brand proofs, visual implementation contracts, staged raster assets, section-by-section page implementation, and optional component backfill through an image-guided workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $maquette to make a homepage for a fictional sparkling beverage brand called Fizz & Co. Start with a greenfield direction concept, then create the brand kit, executable brand proof, page concept, section fidelity contract, staged assets, and page.
Use $maquette-direction to explore homepage directions for a new AI note-taking product before creating its brand kit.
Use $maquette-brand-kit to create a brand kit for a boutique snack brand with a warm premium grocery feel.
Use $maquette-components to build reusable product-card and responsive navigation components from the existing approved Maquette brand canon.
Use $maquette-pages to create a pricing page from the existing approved Maquette brand canon. Include plan cards, feature comparison, FAQs, and a clear upgrade path.
Use $maquette-pages to create a product listing page from the existing Maquette artifacts. Include filters, product cards, promo content, and a complete footer.
